name: agent-guardrails
description: Behavioral guardrails for Claude Code agents. Eleven rules across three hook types: Stop hooks (no-speculative-language, no-stalling, no-preference-asking, no-false-completion, no-skipping, no-dismissing, no-echo-back, no-robotic-comments, no-over-explaining), PreToolUse hooks (no-blind-edit, no-destructive-bash). Includes analyze, install, and update skills for data-driven tuning.
